prod.notes: American date format MM-DD-YYYY should be rejected. AI must ask for DD-MMM-YYYY.
prod.initialRequest: Leave request. Alice, Engineering, Bob, Annual leave

prod.name: Negative - Past date as start date English @negative @date @english
prod.notes: Start date in 2020 — clearly in the past. AI should warn or reject. Tests temporal awareness after R_TEMPORAL fix.
prod.initialRequest: Apply for leave. Alice, Engineering, Bob, Annual

prod.name: Negative - Annual leave insufficient notice English @negative @date @english
prod.notes: Annual leave requires minimum 2 working days notice per prompt_hint. Start date is too soon. AI must warn user — key D1 evidence for minimum notice rule.
prod.initialRequest: I want annual leave starting tomorrow. Alice, Engineering, Bob

prod.name: Negative - End date before start date English @negative @date @english
prod.notes: End date is earlier than start date — impossible date range. AI must detect and reject this logical error.
prod.initialRequest: Leave application. Alice, Engineering, Bob, Annual
